title: cyrtostylis reflexa
intro: Cyrtostylis reflexa, also known as the Australian greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid found in Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cyrtostylis reflexa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and respiratory passages. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use is not widely documented and may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
